frontmatter.aat-event-body: The last ruler of the Valar dynasty takes the crown as shadows gather
A brutal succession war that nearly destroyed the Valar dynasty
The first female ruler of Valar takes the throne peacefully
A mysterious plague decimates populations across the known world
Mages across the continent rise against centuries of oppression
A time of great change in the world
The founding monarch of the Valar dynasty ascends to power, establishing traditions that would last centuries
First contact with lands beyond the Western Sea changes everything
All seven moons align for the first time in recorded history
An illegitimate son challenges the throne with surprising support
